ko.category_description: PC 문서를 출력하는 프린터에 발생한 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.

en.category_description: Report issues related to label printers.

es.category_description: Informe problemas relacionados con impresoras de etiquetas.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya los detalles del problema y la ubicación de la impresora de etiquetas.

fr.category_description: Signaler des problèmes liés aux imprimantes d’étiquettes.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure les détails du problème et l’emplacement de l’imprimante d’étiquettes.

ko.category_description: 라벨을 출력하는 프린터에 발생한 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.

en.category_description: Report issues related to scanners or barcode scanning devices.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the scanner issue details and location information.

es.category_description: Informe problemas relacionados con escáneres o dispositivos de lectura de códigos.

fr.category_description: Signaler des problèmes liés aux scanners ou aux appareils de lecture de codes.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure les détails du problème et l’emplacement du scanner.

en.category_description: Request toner or consumable supplies for printers and label printers.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the required supply details and printer information.
